module.name: no-identical-expressions
module.description: Disallow identical expressions on both sides of a binary or logical operator (Sonar S1764).

scenarios.name: should allow a binary expression with different left and right operands
should allow a logical expression with different operands
should report a binary expression where both operands are identical
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the binary expression

scenarios.name: should report a logical expression where both operands are identical
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the logical expression
